tools_used: direct fetch of supremecourt.gov BIO PDF + local pypdf text extraction
helpful: statpack relist/CVSG/circuit cuts gave a usable quantitative anchor
provisioned petition + QP text meant no fetching for the core documents
CourtListener opinion search let me verify no Justice has questioned Jones
gaps: fedcourts query returned 0 rows for every topic tried (Fourth Amendment / warrant / civil rights, with and without --disposition/--include-open) — either topic matching is too strict or the SCOTUS cert slice lacks topical text; corpus priors were effectively unavailable
brief-in-opposition.txt was not provisioned although the BIO hit the docket 3 days before provisioning; had to fetch and extract the PDF myself
statpack.md in this build has no 'Segment base rate by salience band' section though the prompt says to prefer it
no statpack cut for call-for-response (CFR) petitions — a distinct, common cert signal weaker than CVSG but much stronger than baseline
notes: Forward cell; ~11 retrieval calls total, well under budget.
